notes: Food spots from Nasha's reels and research - PHOTOS NEED UPDATE for Dalbit, Takumi Shimizu, and Umeda A5 Wagyu

spots.name: Giant crab leg buffet (FB reel)
spots.must_try: Crab legs
spots.notes: From Nasha reel. ¥12,000 (~฿2,400). Not on the current itinerary; keep as extra/idea.

spots.name: Yeongdo Haenyeo Village seafood (TikTok)
spots.must_try: Assorted fresh seafood + dipping sauce
spots.notes: By the sea in Busan. Nasha sent as a seaside seafood spot.
distance_to_hotels: 🚕 ~38 min by taxi to W Residence Hotel Haeundae (typical range 30–50 min)
🚕 ~62 min by taxi to Busan Gijang The Club Hotel (typical range 50–75 min)
spots.distance_estimate_note: Estimated from area-level location; refine later with exact pin + live traffic.

spots.name: Zauo Fishing Restaurant Osaka (FB reel)
spots.must_try: Catch-your-own fish menu
spots.notes: Osaka spot where you can fish inside and have it prepared. Location: Osaka (Namba/Shinsaibashi area). From Shinsaibashi: ~10–15 minutes (walk + short train, depending on branch).
spots.from_hotel: From LEOPARD Shinsaibashi: ~10–15 min walk · ~3–6 min taxi

spots.name: Jeju super ramen (FB reel)
spots.must_try: Seafood ramen set
spots.notes: Super ramen in Jeju. Nasha note: ฿560 per person.

spots.name: 101 The Terrace (Seafood hotpot) (FB reel)
spots.notes: Named on reel: 101 The Terrace (101더테라스). Seaside view; jjukkumi shabu + seafood broth. Location pinned to Busan per Trent (low confidence).
distance_to_hotels: 🚕 ~9 min by taxi to W Residence Hotel Haeundae
🚶 ~22 min walk to W Residence Hotel Haeundae
🚕 ~42 min by taxi to Busan Gijang The Club Hotel

spots.name: Yongsan Udon Bar seafood (FB reel)
spots.must_try: Soy-marinated crab + seasonal sashimi
spots.notes: Seoul (Yongsan) udon bar with raw seafood; from Nasha reel.

spots.name: All-you-can-eat Oysters (Takumi Shimizu) (FB reel)
spots.must_try: Miyagi oysters - 12 different oyster dishes
spots.notes: Osaka (Takatsuki) all-you-can-eat oyster restaurant. 12 oyster dishes + 24 other dishes. Oysters from Miyagi Prefecture. 2 min walk from Hankyu Takatsukishi Station. Hours: 17:00-00:00 (Fri 16:00, Sat-Sun 12:00). All-you-can-drink +¥1,000. Nasha sent.
spots.location: Takatsuki, Osaka (2 min walk from Hankyu Takatsukishi Station)
spots.signature: Miyagi oysters, 12 oyster dishes (+24 other dishes)

spots.name: Spicy Oyster Stew (Lorari Gip / 로라리 깁) (FB/IG reel)
spots.must_try: Spicy oyster stew with rice
spots.notes: Busan spicy oyster stew (굴찌개) spot. Features generous oysters in spicy red broth, served with rice. Bowl shows '로라리 깁' (Lorari Gip/House). From Nasha via 우아한사라씨 (Woahan Sarah) reel.
distance_to_hotels: 🚕 ~10 min by taxi to W Residence Hotel Haeundae
🚶 ~24 min walk to W Residence Hotel Haeundae
🚕 ~43 min by taxi to Busan Gijang The Club Hotel
spots.distance_estimate_note: Estimated from area-level location; refine later with exact pin + live traffic.

spots.name: Dalbit Grilled Mackerel / 달빛에구운고등어 (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Wood-fired grilled mackerel + buffet sides
spots.notes: Songjeong Beach, Busan. Ocean-view Korean seafood restaurant. Wood-fired grilled fish + buffet sides (bulgogi, japchae, fresh omelet, kimchi, salads). Casual local vibe, popular with families. Can get busy at peak times. From Nasha via 우아한사라씨 (Woahan Sarah).
distance_to_hotels: 🚕 ~15 min by taxi to W Residence Hotel Haeundae
🚕 ~23 min by taxi to Busan Gijang The Club Hotel
spots.distance_estimate_note: Estimated from area-level location; refine later with exact pin + live traffic.

spots.name: Umeda A5 Wagyu BBQ All-you-can-eat (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: A5 skirt steak + kalbi + curry + karaage
spots.notes: Umeda, Osaka (marked 'osaka-gourmet'). All-you-can-eat A5 beef BBQ shipped directly from Miyazaki. Includes A5 skirt steak (ハラミ), kalbi, horumon, curry, and fried chicken (唐揚げ). Budget-friendly option from ¥1,480; full A5 experience around ¥4,090. Grilled at table. From Nasha via 우아한사라씨 (Woahan Sarah).

spots.name: Bacchanale Shellfish Bar / 貝バル Bacchanale (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: White clam shabu-shabu (白ハマグリしゃぶしゃぶ)
spots.notes: Shinsaibashi, Osaka. Casual seafood bar specializing in shellfish. Signature: white clam shabu-shabu. Also serves assorted fresh shellfish, pork slices for shabu, seaweed, vegetables. Izakaya-style with drinks. From Nasha via 우아한사라씨 (Woahan Sarah).
spots.from_hotel: From LEOPARD Shinsaibashi: ~5–8 min walk · ~2–4 min taxi

spots.name: Yakiniku Gang / 焼肉ギャング 梅田店 (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: A5 Wagyu + thick-cut beef tongue (タン)
spots.notes: Umeda, Osaka. Premium all-you-can-eat yakiniku with A5 Wagyu and thick-cut tongue focus. High-end buffet style. From Nasha via Koki Hironaka reel.

spots.name: Osaka Oyster All-You-Can-Eat Unlimited Time (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Raw oysters + oyster okonomiyaki + ikura bowls
spots.notes: Osaka. Rare no-time-limit all-you-can-eat oyster restaurant. 220+ menu items including raw oysters, grilled oysters, fried oysters (カキフライ), oyster okonomiyaki, ikura bowls, rice bowls, and seafood. Hokkaido seasonal promos. From Nasha via 大阪グルメ【関西グルメ】.
spots.access: From UMEDA Station: ~5–10 min (exact branch TBD)

spots.name: 中トロと豚足 / Chutoro & Pork Feet (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Chutoro (fatty tuna) + pork feet + octopus sashimi
spots.notes: Umeda/Temma, Osaka. 24-hour standing izakaya (立ち飲み屋). Ultra budget-friendly with ¥1 promo items. Famous for chutoro (fatty tuna), pork feet dishes, and octopus sashimi (~¥299). Classic Osaka local experience. Most dishes under ¥400. From Nasha via 大阪グルメ【関西グルメ】.

spots.name: 그날이후불타는삼겹살 / Burning Pork Belly After That Day (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Pork belly + squid teppan with fire show performance
spots.notes: Myeongji, Busan (Gangseo-gu). Large-scale Korean BBQ (700 pyeong venue) with live iron plate cooking and dramatic fire show performances. Chefs cook pork belly, squid, seafood, and fried rice on oversized flat grills with flame effects. High-energy entertainment dining. Popular for groups. Mid-range pricing. From Nasha via 우아한사라씨.
distance_to_hotels: 🚕 ~52 min by taxi to W Residence Hotel Haeundae (typical range 40–65 min)
🚕 ~66 min by taxi to Busan Gijang The Club Hotel (typical range 55–80 min)
spots.distance_estimate_note: Estimated from area-level location; refine later with exact pin + live traffic.

spots.name: The Aquatic Market (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Mantis shrimp + abalone from live tanks
spots.notes: Hong Kong (in shopping mall). Live seafood hotpot - pick from tanks (mantis shrimp, abalone, shellfish), staff cleans for you. Farm-to-table market-style experience. 2-hour dinner / 4-hour lunch. Huge variety. From Nasha via Explorehongkong.
distance_to_hotels: 🚕 ~18 min by taxi to Dorsett Wanchai Hong Kong (typical range 12–30 min depending on exact mall branch & traffic)
🚇 ~22 min by MTR + short walk to Dorsett Wanchai Hong Kong (estimate)
spots.distance_estimate_note: Branch/location not pinned yet; timing is a central-HK estimate and will tighten after exact pin.

spots.name: Sukiyaki Tsuruya / 鶴や (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Wagyu & Kobe beef sukiyaki with raw egg dipping
spots.notes: Nihonbashi, Osaka. ~3 min from Nippombashi Station. Premium wagyu sukiyaki & shabu-shabu. Tourist-friendly location near Dotonbori & Kuromon Market. Perfect intro to Japanese hotpot without high-end prices. Beginner-friendly. From Nasha.
spots.from_hotel: From LEOPARD Shinsaibashi: ~10–15 min walk · ~4–7 min taxi

spots.name: Niku Tokidoki Lemon Umeda / 肉トキドキレモン 梅田 (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Grilled oysters + DIY takoyaki making
spots.notes: Umeda, Osaka (near station). All-you-can-eat izakaya with grilled oysters on teppan, DIY takoyaki making, and 190+ menu items. Includes all-you-can-drink (lemon sour, etc.). Mix of seafood, street food, cheese dishes, meat, noodles. Fun interactive chaotic izakaya vibe. Great for groups. From Nasha via まーしゅ.

spots.name: Tajiri Port Sunday Morning Market / 田尻漁港日曜朝市 (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Grilled squid + octopus rice + fresh tempura
spots.notes: Tajiri, Osaka (Sennan District). Local fishing port market ~40 stalls. Sundays only 7:00-12:00. Fresh seafood straight from boats, grilled squid, octopus rice, tempura. Very local authentic vibe, less touristy than Kuromon Market. From Nasha via usako_love.

spots.name: Sendai Horumon Tokiwatei / 仙台ホルモン焼肉酒場 ときわ亭 (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Beef tongue (タン) all-you-can-eat + 0-second lemon sour
spots.notes: Doyamacho, Umeda, Osaka. ~3 min from Higashi-Umeda Station. Famous for beef tongue AYCE with '0-second lemon sour' taps at your table. Classic salt + green onion tongue (ねぎ塩タン). From Nasha via reel.

spots.name: Kaiten Sushi Jin / 回転寿司 仁 (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Fatty tuna (maguro) + big shrimp
spots.notes: Kyobashi, Osaka. 東野田町2丁目4-20 京橋ビル B1. Premium conveyor belt sushi - chef prepares fresh in front of you. Fresh fish from ports, thick cuts. High quality for cheap price. Open 11:00-22:00, no days off. From Nasha via Koki Hironaka.

spots.name: Yakiniku Lab Umeda / 焼肉Lab 梅田店 (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: Black wagyu + uni + ikura (higher plan)
spots.notes: 2-10-21 Sonezaki, Kita-ku, Osaka. 3 min Higashi-Umeda, 7 min Osaka Station. Phone: 050-5456-0889. Premium all-you-can-eat yakiniku. Quality black wagyu focus, not just quantity. Higher-tier course includes uni + ikura AYCE. From Nasha.

spots.name: Yakiniku Gorichan Shinsaibashi / 焼肉ごりちゃん (IG Reel)
spots.must_try: 50mm thick-cut beef tongue (タン元) - rare tongue root part
spots.notes: 1-3-13 Shinsaibashisuji, Chuo-ku, Osaka. ~3 min from Shinsaibashi Station. Lunch AYCE with 50mm thick-cut gyutan using rare タン元 (tongue root). Unlimited: rice, tongue curry, meat miso, tororo. Lunch 11:00-15:00, Dinner 17:00-23:00. No days off. From Nasha.
spots.from_hotel: From LEOPARD Shinsaibashi: ~3–5 min walk · ~2–3 min taxi

spots.name: Nikai no Oasis KITTE Osaka / ニカイノオアシス KITTE大阪
spots.location: 大阪府大阪市北区梅田3-2-2 KITTE大阪 B1F
spots.access: Direct from Umeda Station west gate (walk ~0 min)
spots.signature: Puri-puri shrimp cutlet, grilled giant river prawns, casual tempura izakaya vibe
spots.notes: From Nasha reel. Quiet-but-fun atmosphere. Good for casual lunch/drinks near station.
spots.must_try: Puri-puri ebi katsu (shrimp cutlet), grilled prawns
